description: Generate comprehensive descriptive statistics for the whole dataset and over time, covering legislation, Hansard, court/legal retrieval fixtures, ontology annotations, rules-as-code candidates, graph outputs, and vectors.
oracle_notes: Track 32 is complete as a deterministic, PipelineRecord-backed and fixture-bounded statistics layer. It emits per-corpus, per-year, entity, ontology coverage, blocker, and Markdown artifacts while keeping true full-corpus claims gated on external Parquet inputs.
